description: Use this API to specify or return the value of the OPF option to fix transformer phase shift angle settings. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = opf_fix_phase_shifters(ival) ierr, ival = opf_fix_phase_shifters()

parameters.name: ival
parameters.description: Indicates whether to enable the option to fix transformer phase shift angles. (input; if Batch command, or for Python if specified as an argument, or for Fortran if IOCODE is 0, then input of 0 by default; else output).

ival.description: do not fix transformer phase shift angle settings.
fix transformer phase shift angle settings.

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
